title: Integration testing readme
body:
Wrote a small primer to setup for integration testing.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

comments.body:
I am fine with this. Although I think we should add the install of ginko to the Makefile.  That should be done in a separate PR.
